title: Multi-region support for non-monday code developers

posts.author: baswienhoven (Bas Wienhoven)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi all,

Super happy to see monday.com released multi-region support. The feature request I am making is to provide the information for non-monday code apps too.

This could be something very similar as what is released for monday code where the developer would provide URL’s for different hosting regions to match those of monday. On installing an app the account is automatically hosted in the right region.

The benefits

  1. Performance increase for having the app’s data close to where the account data is.
  2. Compliance

Looking forward to a response or maybe even a timeline so we can plan for this.
